summary: Raise the published Linear CLI Go toolchain floor from 1.26.3 to 1.26.4 so reachable standard-library vulnerability findings are cleared.
reason: govulncheck reported reachable GO-2026-5039 in net/textproto and GO-2026-5037 in crypto/x509 when the module used Go 1.26.3; both findings are fixed in Go 1.26.4.
validated_outcome: govulncheck ./... no longer reports reachable standard-library vulnerabilities for the published Linear CLI when evaluated with Go 1.26.4.
